title: Enable versions.test.fidl test
description: This will require implementation of the FIDL versioning system. First port the fidlc/src/versioning_types.(h|cc) code and then look through the fidlc/src/(availability|consume|replacement|resolve)_step.* files.

title: Un-ignore tests in attributes_tests.rs
description: The initial port of attributes_tests.cc left many tests disabled. We should investigate and fix the compiler to un-ignore these tests.

title: Port availability_step for versioning
description: Port fidlc/src/availability_step.(h|cc) to fidlcrs to populate Availability structs for all AST nodes.

title: Clean up clippy warnings in tree_visitor.rs
description: There are several unused variable warnings in tree_visitor.rs ('visitor' and 'node' in a trait or default impl). Prefix them with _ or remove if appropriate.

title: Port handle_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/handle_tests.cc to src/tests/handle_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port fidlc/tests/test_library.(cc|h)
description:
This test library class is used extensively in the C++ fidlc implementation to test compiler features.

I'd like to have you port some of the tests next, but hte first step is to port the test library over.

title: Un-ignore typeshape_tests
description: The tests in src/tests/typeshape_tests.rs have 2 ignored tests: bad_inline_size_exceeds_limit and bad_integer_overflow_struct. Un-ignore them and implement necessary validations.

title: Add type checking for constant binary operators
description: The tests bad_or_operator_different_types_test and bad_or_operator_non_primitive_types_test in consts_tests.rs currently incorrectly pass when they should fail with compilation errors. Update compile_constant and validate_constant to ensure the bitwise OR operator can only be applied to same-typed numeric primitives.

title: Add struct validations to compiler to unignore structurally failing tests
description: Implement missing error validations in compiler.rs (like cyclic recursion checks, member type validity, inline size checks etc) so that structs_tests.rs can be fully unignored.

title: Port method_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/method_tests.cc to src/tests/method_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with #[ignore].

title: make nullable test pass
description: The `nullable.test.fidl` golden test currently fails when uncommented in `generate-goldens.sh`. Implement correct parsing and compilation support for nullable modifiers (e.g. `MyStruct? ` or `vector<T>:?`) inside fidlcrs.

title: Port errcat_docs_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/errcat_docs_tests.cc to src/tests/errcat_docs_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Implement compile-time checks for bits declarations
description: Currently many tests in bits_tests.rs are ignored because fidlcrs lacks layout and type validation for bits. Implement validations for power of two values, overlapping mask flags, duplicate member names, nullable layout bounds, incorrect negative values for unsigned primitives, etc in `compile_bits` to unignore the failing bad tests.

title: Port strictness_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/strictness_tests.cc to src/tests/strictness_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port span_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/span_tests.cc to src/tests/span_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Update protocol_tests.rs to use TestLibrary expect_fail
description: Port protocol_tests.rs errors assertions from the iter().any(...) format to the newer TestLibrary object expect_fail / check_compile API.

title: Port versioning_interleaving_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_interleaving_tests.cc to src/tests/versioning_interleaving_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Add assertions to structs_tests.rs
description: Add type_decl members length assertions to good_primitive_default_value_literal test

title: use clap for argument parsing
description:
Use clap for argument parsing. Be careful to correctly implement the handling of --files.

If this can't be implemented correctly with clap then stop and tell the user.

title: Port json_diagnostics_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/json_diagnostics_tests.cc to src/tests/json_diagnostics_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port overlay_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/overlay_tests.cc to src/tests/overlay_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Report structured compilation errors for availability validation
description: The methods in versioning_types.rs now return values to indicate validation failures (e.g., NarrowError) instead of panicking. Update the compiler, specifically AvailabilityStep, to handle these failures and emit the corresponding structured FIDL compiler errors via reporter.fail().

title: Port versioning_decomposition_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_decomposition_tests.cc to src/tests/versioning_decomposition_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Fix remaining #[ignore] tests in errors_tests.rs
description:
Address compiler architectural gaps causing tests to be ignored: 
1) Enforce file-level library declaration validations in parser (fixes bad_error_empty_file, bad_incorrect_identifier).
2) Validate @transitional attribute to throw ErrDeprecatedAttribute (fixes transitional_removed).
3) Fix AllowArbitraryErrorTypes experimental flag evaluation during compiler checks (fixes experimental_allow_arbitrary_error_types).

title: Robustly validate availability versions without panicking
description: Refactoring in FC-i3hopu removed some assertions from versioning_types.rs (e.g. valid bounds) to stop tests from panicking when invalid version combos were tested. We should replace the leftover asserts with structured FIDL compilation errors via Reporter, and properly map narrow() failures avoiding panics.

title: Port versioning_inheritance_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_inheritance_tests.cc to src/tests/versioning_inheritance_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Implement compile-time checks for protocol declarations
description: Currently many tests in protocol_tests.rs are ignored because fidlcrs does not run validation checks on protocol declarations like duplicate methods, strict/flexible modifiers in wrong positions, invalid request/response argument layout rules, payload struct constraints, etc. Implement these compiler diagnostics within compile_step.rs.

title: Un-ignore strictness_tests and fix related compiler bugs
description: The strictness_tests have been ported to Rust but are marked #[ignore]. Investigate each one, remove #[ignore], and fix the bugs in compiler.rs or other modules that prevent them from passing. Note that the bad_* tests expect specific diagnostic errors.

title: Port errcat_good_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/errcat_good_tests.cc to src/tests/errcat_good_tests.rs

title: Implement AST TreeVisitor bounds mapping logic
description: The tests ported in src/tests/span_tests.rs are marked as ignored as they require fidlcrs to implement a TreeVisitor to walk the AST and test source span bounding matches correctly. Implement a TreeVisitor and enable these tests.

title: Fix ignored tests in flexible_tests.rs
description: Address compilation validation logic gaps causing tests bad_enum_max_value_without_unknown_signed, bad_enum_max_value_without_unknown_unsigned, and bad_enum_multiple_unknown to fail when validating enum error messages.

title: Un-ignore bits_constants tests
description: Fix compiler deficiencies blocking bits_constants.test.fidl and constants.test.fidl to un-ignore them in compare_generation_tests.

title: Port utils_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/utils_tests.cc to src/tests/utils_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port versioning_types_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_types_tests.cc to src/tests/versioning_types_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Fix ignored tests in flat_ast_tests.rs
description: Address compilation validation logic gaps causing the tests bad_anonymous_name_conflict and bad_multiple_libraries_same_name to fail.

title: Fix failing tests in alias_tests.rs
description: Many tests ported from 'alias_tests.cc' to 'alias_tests.rs' are currently failing and marked as #[ignore]. We need to fix the compiler's handling of aliases to make these tests pass. E.g. fix 'good_primitive', 'bad_cannot_null_twice', 'bad_duplicate_alias', etc.

title: Port all diagnostics over from fidlc/src/diagnostics.h
description: if any of them aren't in use yet they can be marked to allow them to be unused.

title: Turn compare-generation.sh into a Rust test
description:
Convert the compare-generation.sh script into a Rust test that's run as part of `cargo test`. It should either invoke the fidlcrs binary or call into the entry-point that main() uses.

When there's a golden mismatch a diff should be shown.

title: Validate --name flag
description: The command-line interface now accepts a `--name LIBRARY_NAME` argument. Add validation in fidlcrs to check if the main compiled library actually matches `expected_library_name`. Ensure errors properly reflect mismatches, identical to the C++ fidlc compiler.

title: Un-ignore more golden tests
description: Check compare_generation_tests disabled tests like consts.test.fidl, handles.test.fidl to see if they can be moved to active now that many compiler checks are implemented.

title: Port alias_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/alias_tests.cc to src/tests/alias_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked #[ignore] to skip.

title: Pass --experimental CLI arguments down to the Compiler
description: The `--experimental` command line flag is successfully parsed into `cli.experimental` (a `Vec<String>`), but it is currently ignored in `src/main.rs`. We should add an `experimental_flags: Vec<String>` field to the `Compiler` struct, populate it from `cli.experimental` during initialization, and include those flags in the `experiments` list output in the generated JSON. Validating known experimental flags should also be considered if necessary.

title: Add exact error assertions for invalid declarations in other tests
description: Currently tests like `errors_tests.rs`, `table_tests.rs`, `union_tests.rs`, `protocol_tests.rs` and `enums_tests.rs` use `.is_err()` to assert validation failures. We should assert exact error categories instead, similar to what was done for structs_tests.rs.

title: Implement utils metrics (id manipulation, canonicalization)
description: The tests ported in src/tests/utils_tests.rs are marked as ignored as they require fidlcrs to implement the string and generic ID bounds parsing utilities in src/utils.rs just like fidlc/src/utils.cc natively handles them. Implement them.

title: Implement compile-time checks for Service constraints
description: Port validation logic for Services from C++ fidlc to Rust. This includes checking for conflicting members, preventing nullable protocol members, ensuring only protocol (client ends) are present, banning use of Services inside other decls (like Structs), and restricting to a single protocol transport kind. Un-ignore the relevant tests in src/tests/service_tests.rs once implemented.

title: Port versioning_replacement_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_replacement_tests.cc to src/tests/versioning_replacement_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port resource_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/resource_tests.cc to src/tests/resource_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port steps architecture from C++
description:
The C++ fidlc implementation in fidlc/src/ implements the compiler in terms of several "steps". The Compiler::Compile() method in fidlc/src/compiler.cc calls each of the steps in a particular order.

Update this Rust implementation, fidlcrs, to follow this same pattern. This may mean moving code that's currently directly on the Compiler struct into separate step structs. Features that are not yet supported fidlcrs don't need to be ported over, but put the structure in place so that they can be added later. In fact, if you notice them add thicket tickets to track that work with details you come across.

As you develop, keep running "cargo check" and "./generate_goldens.sh" to ensure that we move the structure of the program forward without losing ground on features. Don't enable any additional files in the generate_goldens.sh script - if you need broader tests then file a ticket and we'll come back to it later.

title: Evaluate identifier constants properly in compile_constant
Port versioning_overlap_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_overlap_tests.cc to src/tests/versioning_overlap_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Implement missing compiler features for remaining ignored errcat tests
description: Currently there are several errcat_good_tests such as good0117b, good0203b, good0213a etc that are ignored because they use missing compiler features like use_library_fdf or test name conflicts across methods. We should implement these remaining features.

title: Replace custom 1000+ error constants with official fidlc diagnostics
description: The compiler currently relies on bespoke constants >=1000 (e.g. ERR_ARRAY_CONSTRAINT, ERR_EXPECTED_VALUE, ERR_MEMBER_OVERFLOW, ERR_DUPLICATE_METHOD_NAME) rather than their accurately ported counterparts (e.g. ERR_NAME_COLLISION). Identify the equivalent ported constants (ID < 1000) for all these temporary placeholders and update compiler.rs, parser.rs, etc. Remove the 1000+ definitions after replacement.

title: Port reporter_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/reporter_tests.cc to src/tests/reporter_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port json_findings_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/json_findings_tests.cc to src/tests/json_findings_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port new_type_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/new_type_tests.cc to src/tests/new_type_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Fix compiler warnings in main.rs and cli.rs
description: The fidlcrs build currently outputs many warnings about unused variables and mutable variables not mutating. Clean these up to keep the console output clean.

title: Implement full @no_resource validation rules
description: The @no_resource attribute tests bad_no_resource_uses_resource and bad_no_resource_composition are currently ignored in attributes_tests.rs because the compiler does not yet properly emit ErrResourceForbiddenHere or ErrNoResourceForbidsCompose when resource structs are used inside methods of @no_resource protocols.

title: Fix bad_name_collision for constants
description: The test bad_name_collision currently incorrectly passes when it should generate an error because it defines a constant that conflicts with an existing name. Validate constant declarations to ensure unique, non-colliding names.

title: Fix handle type validations to unignore handle_tests
description: Currently, the FIDL compiler in Rust does not fully validate handle subtypes (e.g. THREAD, PROCESS) and rights (e.g. DUPLICATE, TRANSFER) correctly, and simply ignores many invalid handle definitions. Update compiler.rs to correctly resolve handle constraints and enforce FIDL handle rules, so that the #[ignore] attribute can be removed from failing handle_tests.

title: Port generated_name_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/generated_name_tests.cc to src/tests/generated_name_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port versioning_platform_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_platform_tests.cc to src/tests/versioning_platform_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Implement recoverable compilation
description: The tests ported in src/tests/recoverable_compilation_tests.rs are marked as ignored as they require the compiler to properly recover from initial parsing/validation errors and return multiple diagnostics. Implement this feature to enable the tests.

title: Port ExpectFail/ExpectWarn/CheckDiagnostics from test_library.h
description: The C++ test library code allows tests to set which errors and warnings they expect to see and then assert that those are produced. Right now Rust tets are doing this manually. Let's port over the C++ code to the Rust TestLibrary and update some tests to take advantage of this cleaner, clearer system

title: Port fidlc/tests/consts_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port consts_tests.cc to Rust using the new TestLibrary implementation.

title: Implement versioned modifier validation in availability step
description: Currently the parser ignores ErrConflictingModifier and ErrDuplicateModifier if the modifiers have versioning attributes like @available. This should be validated during the availability step dynamically to ensure conflicting modifiers don't co-exist within the same active version.

title: Port errcat_good_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/errcat_good_tests.cc to src/tests/errcat_good_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: More sophisticated goldens generation
description:
Look at how golden files are specified in fidlc/testdata/BUILD.gn and note how different test libraries are defined with different parameters.

In particular look at how the following variables vary based on which filenames are being generated:
 - public_deps
 - experimental_flags
 - versioned
 - contains drivers

Update generate-goldens.sh so that the same variables are set when we go to compile FIDL libraries. Don't worry about using these values yet.

title: Command-line interface
description: fidlcrs must implement the same command-line interface as fidlc. Look at the implementation in fidlc/cmd/fidlc/main.cc and implement the same interface in fidlcrs

title: Port ordinals_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/ordinals_tests.cc to src/tests/ordinals_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port NamingContext logic from C++
description: Port the naming context logic from the C++ fidlc implementation. In particular there's logic in fidlc/src/name.cc fidlc/src/name.h and fidlc/src/consume_step.cc.

title: Implement Versioning availability mappings in TestLibrary
description: The tests ported in src/tests/versioning_attribute_tests.rs are currently ignored. fidlcrs TestLibrary struct lacks select_version tracking and the AST needs explicit validation tracking for version bound annotations.

title: Un-ignore tests in types_tests.rs
description: Fix types_tests.rs disabled and un-ported tests. This includes porting the remaining static_asserts and expects into standard valid test conditions.

title: Port virtual_source_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/virtual_source_tests.cc to src/tests/virtual_source_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port service_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/service_tests.cc to src/tests/service_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Fix compiler logic for files disagreeing on library name
description: Address ignored tests inside src/tests/library_tests.rs by implementing missing compiler validations for files disagreeing on library name.

title: Port attributes_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/attributes_tests.cc to src/tests/attributes_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Fix compiler warnings
description: Clean up unused variables (e.g., decl_context) and unreachable patterns identified during compilation.

title: Implement byte and bytes built-in aliases
description: fidlcrs currently treats 'byte' and 'bytes' as unknown types because it doesn't recognize them. Implement these built-ins as 'uint8' and 'vector<uint8>' and un-ignore byte_and_bytes.test.fidl in compare_generation_tests.

title: Port versioning_attribute_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_attribute_tests.cc to src/tests/versioning_attribute_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Fix VersioningBasic tests and finalize struct AST nodes
description: The tests ported in src/tests/versioning_basic_tests.rs are marked ignored because the current layout struct nodes do not inherently handle inline mapping parsing and execution routines tracking to target versioned variants cleanly like fidlc does.

title: Un-ignore unused files inside compare_generation_tests
description: There was a list of commented out experimental FIDL tests inside the old `compare-generation.sh` that are currently omitted. With the newer parser checks and implementations, we should reexamine `fidlc/testdata` files like `byte_and_bytes.test.fidl` or `constants.test.fidl` and implement missing generator functionality to turn on these failing integration tests.

title: Port remaining SharedAmongstLibraries tests
description: Check all usages of SharedAmongstLibraries in fidlc/tests/ and ensure that any tests that have not been ported to Rust yet are translated. Currently we matched around 40 tests, but there might be unported ones left.

title: Implement positional format parameters in Reporter metrics
description: The tests ported in src/tests/reporter_tests.rs are marked as ignored as they require Reporter in rust to cleanly support format string index mapping like '{0}' and '{1}' which C++ fmt does automatically. Implement this feature to enable the tests.

title: Implement AttributeSchema constraints and missing validations
description:
The AttributeSchemaMap validation logic needs several unimplemented features ported from C++: 
1. the constraints (such as discoverable_constraint, transport_constraint, no_resource_constraint) are currently hardcoded to return true.
2. Evaluation of attribute arguments is incomplete (it doesn't resolve constants or validate against constant value types correctly).
3. Revisit failing tests in attributes_tests.rs once these features are completed.

title: Identify and port any remaining unported tests in fidlc
description: Evaluate C++ fidlc compiler test suites against the fidlcrs test suites and begin porting any remaining unported test files.

title: Implement compile-time checks for union declarations
description: Currently many tests in union_tests.rs are ignored because fidlcrs does not run validation checks on union declarations like missing explicit ordinals, ordinal uniqueness, out of bounds ordinals, union starting from 0, empty strict unions, inline layouts, etc. Implement these compiler diagnostics within compile_step.rs.

title: Port transport_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/transport_tests.cc to src/tests/transport_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port replacement_step for versioning
description: Port fidlc/src/replacement_step.(h|cc) to fidlcrs to check 'replaced' usage in @available attributes.

title: Pass BUILD.gn variables to fidlcrs in generate-goldens.sh
description: Now that we extract variables like public_deps and experimental_flags in generate-goldens.sh, update the invocation to actually pass these flags to the fidlcrs executable. E.g. --experimental=allow_new_types, etc.

title: Port errors_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/errors_tests.cc to src/tests/errors_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port fidlc/tests/parsing_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port parsing_tests.cc to Rust using the new TestLibrary implementation.

title: Update parser to parse modifier attributes
description: Update fidlcrs parser to extract and preserve attributes attached to modifiers (e.g. strict(removed=3))

title: Update table_tests.rs to use TestLibrary expect_fail
description: Port table_tests.rs errors assertions from the iter().any(...) format to the newer TestLibrary object expect_fail / check_compile API.

title: Port validation logic for libraries and using directives
description: Port missing logic from C++ for verifying dependencies, lib names, and un-ignore tests in using_tests.rs.

title: Keep JSON use isolated
description: Remove uses of serde_json out of code other than in src/json_generator.rs, src/cli.rs and tests/*

title: Implement --format output logic
description: The `--format=[text|json]` command line flag is parsed by `clap` into `cli.format` and captured in `_format`, but the logic to output `text` format (which would print the generated AST in a custom text represention rather than JSON) is currently unimplemented. We should update `src/main.rs` to respect this flag, avoiding generating and saving `json_string` if the format requested is `text`.

title: Port using_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/using_tests.cc to src/tests/using_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with #[ignore].

title: Port flat_ast_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/flat_ast_tests.cc to src/tests/flat_ast_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Support compiling multiple library dependencies via multiple --files flags
description: The CLI accepts multiple `--files` flags chunks representing dependency libraries in topological order. Currently fidlcrs flattens all files and merges them into the main library AST. It must instead maintain separate library structures, resolve external cross-referencing types across them, and output only the final main library AST while including dependency external types in `library_dependencies` and `external_struct_declarations`.

title: Port resource_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/resource_tests.cc to src/tests/resource_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with `#[ignore]`.

title: Port alias_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/alias_tests.cc to src/tests/alias_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Implement an error reporting mechanism
description: Currently, `compiler.rs` generates `unknown` synthetic types when a declaration isn't found, and it uses `panic!` in `resolve_type` for unsupported layouts. It silently ignores missing types with a commented out `eprintln!`. A proper diagnostic collection mechanism (similar to `fidlc`'s `Reporter->Fail`) should be implemented so that errors can be gathered and printed at the end.

title: Port direct_dependencies_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/direct_dependencies_tests.cc to src/tests/direct_dependencies_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port types_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/types_tests.cc to src/tests/types_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Update structs_tests.rs to use TestLibrary expect_fail
description: Port structs_tests.rs errors assertions from the iter().any(...) format to the newer TestLibrary object expect_fail / check_compile API.

title: Port validation logic for attributes
description: Port missing validation and verification logic for attributes from C++ to Rust. Un-ignore relevant tests in attributes_tests.rs.

title: Un-ignore tests in method_tests.rs
description: The initial port of method_tests.cc left tests disabled if they were bad or complicated. Un-ignore these tests and fix the compiler to make them pass.

title: Implement versioning basic logic
description: The tests in tests::versioning_basic_tests are currently ignored. Implement basic versioning availability logic such as reference valid ranges, interacting modifiers, availability bounds checking across modules.

title: Port formatter_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/formatter_tests.cc to src/tests/formatter_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Enable multi-library errcat tests
description: Many tests in errcat_good_tests.rs, such as good0038ab, rely on multiple libraries but were previously creating disjoint TestLibrary instances or incorrectly attempting to use `SharedAmongstLibraries`. Implement a way for errcat test files to correctly utilize and share a single `SharedAmongstLibraries` across test files, add dependencies between them, so the compilation passes and the #[ignore] attribute can be removed.

title: Port versioning_basic_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_basic_tests.cc to src/tests/versioning_basic_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port resourceness_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/resourceness_tests.cc to src/tests/resourceness_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Clean up LibraryDependency generation
description: The LibraryDependency generation in compiler.rs currently hardcodes the zx library declarations if any file contains 'using zx;'. This should be made more robust by correctly resolving and importing library declarations from actual .fidl files or a provided SDK.

title: Fix compiler warnings in main.rs and cli.rs
description: Address the remaining unused variables/mutability warnings in main.rs and cli.rs. E.g. _expected_platform, _warnings_as_errors, unused `arg` in main parser loop, etc.

title: Port handle_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/handle_tests.cc to src/tests/handle_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with `#[ignore]`.

title: Port lint_findings_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/lint_findings_tests.cc to src/tests/lint_findings_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Use argh for argument parsing
description: Use the argh crate to parse arguments rather than doing manual parsing in main.rs

title: Differentiate dependent libraries from the main library in arg parsing
description: Currently, `fidlcrs` gathers all source files from all `--files` chunks into a flat list before compiling them all at once. The FIDL compiler specification is that earlier `--files` chunks are libraries that the final `--files` chunk depends on. We need to distinguish these dependent libraries, only parsing them and treating them as external references when compiling the final source files as the main library.

title: Implement compile-time checks for struct declarations
description: Currently many tests in structs_tests.rs are failing or ignored. Implement strict layout checks, valid defaults checking, references checks for struct members.

title: Port remainder of src/tests to use TestLibrary expect_fail
description: Several test files like union_tests.rs, structs_tests.rs, protocol_tests.rs, and using_tests.rs still use the old iter.any pattern instead of TestLibrary::expect_fail and check_compile. We should port them to the new API.

title: Update errors_tests.rs to use TestLibrary expect_fail
description: Port errors_tests.rs errors assertions from the iter().any(...) format to the newer TestLibrary object expect_fail / check_compile API.

title: Port fidlc/tests/experimental_flags_tests.cc to Rust
description: Check fidlc/tests/experimental_flags_tests.cc and implement remaining tests in Rust

title: Un-ignore types_tests and implement parsing/resolution fixes
description: The C++ tests from types_tests.cc have been successfully ported over to Rust using the TestLibrary framework in src/tests/types_tests.rs and marked with #[ignore]. Systematically un-ignore each test, fix any missing code generating capabilities like experimental type flag mapping, and verify error outputs.

title: Clean up clippy warnings in availability_step.rs and consume_step.rs
description: There are several clippy warnings about using .as_ref().map(|v| &**v) instead of .as_deref() in availability_step.rs, and unnecesary map_or in consume_step.rs. Clean them up.

title: Port string_array_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/string_array_tests.cc to src/tests/string_array_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port using_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/using_tests.cc to src/tests/using_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port recoverable_compilation_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/recoverable_compilation_tests.cc to src/tests/recoverable_compilation_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Fix has_padding mismatch for recursive types in typeshape_tests
description: In `typeshape_tests::tests`, several tests (e.g. `good_recursion_handles_bounded`, `good_recursive_union_and_struct`) are failing due to a `has_padding` mismatch for structs and unions involved in recursion. The recursive types evaluation needs to properly calculate `has_padding` based on the child types or itself.

title: Un-ignore table_tests and fix compiler diagnostic bugs
description: The table_tests.cc file has been successfully ported to src/tests/table_tests.rs and ignored. Iterate through these tests, un-ignore them, and fulfill whatever missing logic or unhandled diagnostic failures in the compiler prevent them from passing.

title: Port parameterized tests
description: The C++ tests span_test.cc, versioning_basic_tests.cc, versioning_overlap_tests.cc, and versioning_replacement_tests.cc use gtest parameterization. Implement support for this in the corresponding Rust tests.

title: Implement compile-time checks for array layouts
description: Currently many tests in array_tests.rs are marked as ignored because fidlcrs does not run layout validations for arrays to catch zero-sized arrays, missing array sizes, non-parameterized arrays, optional arrays, or arrays with multiple constraints. This ticket is for implementing these validations in compile_step.rs so that the bad array tests in array_tests.rs can be un-ignored and pass.

title: Port types_tests.rs and others to use TestLibrary expect_fail
description: Several other test files like resourceness_tests.rs, types_tests.rs, strictness_tests.rs, attributes_tests.rs, and method_tests.rs still use errors[0].def == Error::... or assert!(lib.compile().is_err()) instead of the new TestLibrary::expect_fail() and check_compile() API. We should port them.

title: Implement resourceness validations to un-ignore resourceness tests
description: The resourceness_tests have been ported to Rust but are all currently ignored. Many of them might pass out of the box, others will require implementing resourceness validations in compiler.rs. Iterate through them, remove #[ignore], and fix the compiler to make them pass.

title: Add compiler validations for @generated_name
description: Address ignored tests inside src/tests/generated_name_tests.rs by implementing missing compiler validations for @generated_name.

title: Implement --json-schema flag
description: The `--json-schema` flag is parsed by \clap\ but currently does nothing. Update `src/main.rs` to check for this flag and, if present, print the contents of the FIDL JSON schema (ideally embedded using `include_str!("../fidlc/schema.json")`) and exit immediately, matching the behavior of the original C++ compiler.

title: Implement protocol method request/response payload generation
description: The fidlcrs compiler currently compiles protocols but does not properly generate synthesized Request structs and Response unions for methods with payloads or errors (where `is_result` = true). Implement this so that golden tests don't have to test with protocol output ignored.

title: Un-ignore more unused files like inheritance.test.fidl in compare_generation_tests
description: There are many unused files commented out or in disabled_tests in src/tests/compare_generation_tests.rs like inheritance.test.fidl, inheritance_with_recursive_decl.test.fidl, time.test.fidl. Enable these files by fixing compilation bugs and ensuring their output matches the expected JSON.

title: Remove unused variables and dead code from tests module
description: Address compiler warnings by removing unused 'shared' variables from errcat_good_tests.rs and the unused 'get_file_content' function from attributes_tests.rs, canonical_names_tests.rs, and method_tests.rs.

title: Port canonical_names_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/canonical_names_tests.cc to src/tests/canonical_names_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Fix JSON output for constants and bits_constants
description: Currently constants.test.fidl and bits_constants.test.fidl fail golden tests because constant evaluated values and expressions are not fully correct in fidlcrs. Fix the constant evaluator in compiler.rs to correctly produce JSON matching the golden files.

title: Un-ignore experimental_maybe_from_alias test
description: Fix remaining issues preventing experimental_maybe_from_alias.test.fidl from passing the golden tests in compare_generation_tests.

title: Un-ignore types_in_protocols test in compare_generation_tests
description: Fix remaining issues preventing types_in_protocols.test.fidl from passing the golden tests in compare_generation_tests.

title: Add CLI tests for experimental flags
description: We should verify that cli::run correctly parses and passes --experimental flags to the Compiler.

title: Implement complete validation for constants and parameters
description: Fix ignoring consts_tests where bit manipulation, constant ranges, bounds are not validated.

title: Distinguish main library from dependencies during compilation
description: Currently, `src/main.rs` flattens all `--files` chunks into a single list of source files and passes them collectively to `Compiler::compile`. According to the  spec, each `--files` chunk describes a distinct library, given in dependency order, with only the final chunk representing the main library. Update `Compiler::compile` (and related flow) to accept `main_files` distinct from `dependency_files`, so that dependencies are correctly handled separately and output is only generated for the main library.

title: Implement versioning attribute validation
description: The tests in tests::versioning_attribute_tests are currently ignored. Implement validation logic for @available attributes such as checking added, removed, deprecated versions, valid bounds, and attribute placement rules.

title: Port method_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/method_tests.cc to src/tests/method_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port struct_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/struct_tests.cc to src/tests/struct_tests.rs

title: Port fidlc/tests/structs_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port structs_tests.cc to Rust using the new TestLibrary implementation.

title: Un-ignore driver_handle test in compare_generation_tests
description: Investigate why the driver_handle.test.fidl is failing or un-ignore it if it works.

title: Fix ignored tests in errors_tests.rs
description: During the porting of errors_tests.cc to Rust, 7 tests were left #[ignore] because they were failing. The next agent should debug and fix the compiler validation logic causing these failures. The failing tests are: bad_error_empty_file, bad_error_missing_type, bad_error_unknown_identifier, bad_error_wrong_primitive, bad_incorrect_identifier, experimental_allow_arbitrary_error_types, transitional_removed. They might be returning incorrect diagnostics or panicking during AST analysis.

title: Port types_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/types_tests.cc to src/tests/types_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with #[ignore].

title: Un-ignore tests in using_tests.rs
description: The using tests check things like unused imports which aren't implemented cleanly. Go unignore and port those checks completely.

title: Fix resource type validations to unignore resource_tests
description: Currently, the FIDL compiler in Rust does not fully validate resource definitions properly, nor does it emit them within `JsonRoot::experimental_resource_declarations`. As a result, all `resource_tests` are marked with `#[ignore]`. Implement resource validations (e.g., checking it's derived from uint32, has valid subtype/rights, prevent duplicates) and populate the AST representations to pass these tests and remove `#[ignore]`.

title: Port table_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/table_tests.cc to src/tests/table_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Un-ignore new_type test in compare_generation_tests
description: Fix remaining issues preventing new_type.test.fidl from passing the golden tests in compare_generation_tests, fixing issues related to new_type output replacing alias.

title: Port fidlc/tests/bits_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port bits_tests.cc to Rust using the new TestLibrary implementation.

title: Actual parsing for available and versioned
description: The parser currently uses a fake parsing approach for --available and --versioned flags by just calling args.claim() and ignoring the value. Implement true parsing for these parameters per fidlc CLI specs.

title: Investigate union declaration order golden diff
description: The union.json golden file showed a change in declaration order after NamingContext refactoring. Verify if this change is correct and update the golden file if necessary.

title: Port service_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/service_tests.cc to src/tests/service_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with `#[ignore]`.

title: Add assertions to parsing_tests.rs
description: Add constant value assertion to parsing_tests.rs

title: Update union_tests.rs to use TestLibrary expect_fail
description: Port union_tests.rs errors assertions from the iter().any(...) format to the newer TestLibrary object expect_fail / check_compile API.

title: Fix has_padding in generated structs containing handles
description: The usage of protocol ends (zx.Handle) in structs seems to trigger padding=true in golden but false in generated. Check if 4-byte handles in 8-byte aligned structs cause padding.

title: Fail compilation if type declarations have constraints
description: Address TODO(https://fxbug.dev/42175339) in consume_step.rs: ConsumeTypeDeclaration to fail compilation if type_ctor has constraints.

title: Un-ignore consts.test.fidl test in compare_generation_tests
description: Fix compiler issues preventing consts.test.fidl from passing the golden tests in compare_generation_tests.

title: Port flexible_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/flexible_tests.cc to src/tests/flexible_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Add unit tests for unused --files library detection
description: We added an unused library detection check matching the C++ behavior when building from the command line, but we should add full rust unit tests mimicking CLI execution to verify it emits ErrUnusedLibrary Provided or fails properly.

title: Port recoverable_parsing_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/recoverable_parsing_tests.cc to src/tests/recoverable_parsing_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Implement verification tests for ordinals
description: The tests ported in src/tests/ordinals_tests.rs are marked as ignored as they need to be implemented. Implement the remaining tests.

title: Support compiling multiple files per invocation
description: The command-line parser in src/main.rs now parses multiple files arguments from the `--files` flag, but the compiler itself only processes the first file. Extend fidlcrs to process all provided files and merge their ASTs correctly into the library compilation.

title: Fix binary operators in constants
description: The tests bad_or_operator_different_types_test and bad_or_operator_non_primitive_types_test in consts_tests.rs are currently failing and have been ignored. Fix compile_constant to properly evaluate and validate binary operators.

title: Add unused library detection for --files argument
description: The fidlc executable should report an error when a library provided via --files is unused (not imported via a  declaration by the primary source files). Refer to fidlc/cmd/fidlc/main.cc for the C++ behavior.

title: make anonymous test pass
description: The `anonymous.test.fidl` golden test currently fails when uncommented in `generate-goldens.sh`. Implement support for anonymous inline layouts (structs, unions, etc) inside fidlcrs.

title: Un-ignore bits_constants tests
description: Fix compiler deficiencies blocking bits_constants.test.fidl and constants.test.fidl to un-ignore them in compare_generation_tests.

title: Port canonical_names_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/canonical_names_tests.cc to src/tests/canonical_names_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with #[ignore].

title: Implement compile-time checks for recursive types and vectors
description: Port validation logic for recursive structs (e.g. infinite size checks) and vector layout constraints (similar to arrays). Un-ignore relevant tests in structs_tests.rs.

title: Port direct_dependencies_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/direct_dependencies_tests.cc to src/tests/direct_dependencies_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with `#[ignore]`.

title: Update consume_step and resolve_step for versioning
description: Update consume_step and resolve_step to handle version filtering and validation, mirroring fidlc's implementation.

title: Enable protocols test
description: Uncomment protocols.test.fidl from generate-goldens.sh, run the script and fix any issues

title: Port lint_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/lint_tests.cc to src/tests/lint_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Use SharedAmongstLibraries in tests
description: Look through all of the tests in fidlc/tests/ to find where SharedAmongstLibraries is used. For each of those tests, update the corresponding Rust test in src/tests/ to use the new Rust SharedAmongstLibraries type.

title: Fix and un-ignore span tests
description: Ensure that diagnostic spans are correctly tracked and reported in errors. Un-ignore tests in span_tests.rs.

title: Add assertions to ordinals_tests.rs
description: Add missing constant/ordinal assertions to ordinals_tests.rs that are present in ordinals_tests.cc

title: Port library_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/library_tests.cc to src/tests/library_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port errors_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/errors_tests.cc to src/tests/errors_tests.rs

title: Add CLI tests for JSON output path writing
description: We should verify that cli::run correctly writes out to the provided --json path instead of failing silently.

title: Implement compile-time type checks for constant declarations
description: Currently many tests in consts_tests.rs are ignored because fidlcrs does not enforce type validation on constant assignments (e.g., bool assigned to string, numeric overflow, out of bounds integer conversions, incompatible types for OR operator, missing dependencies). These compiler diagnostics should be implemented.

title: Implement recoverable parsing diagnostics
description: The tests ported in src/tests/recoverable_parsing_tests.rs are marked as ignored as they require the compiler to properly recover from lexer/parsing validation errors and return multiple diagnostics. Implement this feature to enable the tests.

title: Validate compilation output against CLI expectation flags
description: Currently we parse flags like `--name`, `--versioned`, and `--werror` using clap, but they are not used during compilation in `src/main.rs`. Implement logic to validate that the library name matches `--name`, check versions for `--versioned`, and fail the build if warnings are generated and `--werror` is set.

title: Add exact error assertions for invalid struct defaults
description: Currently structs_tests.rs uses `.is_err()` to assert struct validation failures. We should assert exact error categories instead.

title: Fix ignored tests in canonical_names_tests.rs
description: Fix the recently ported tests in src/tests/canonical_names_tests.rs that are currently marked with `#[ignore]`.
